examples: He checked his watch for the umpteenth time.
I explained for the umpteenth time why I didn't support the bill.
Not so many remember the umpteenth collapse of the American economy a few months before.
Dislosure: For the umpteenth time, I worked at AOL before joining Forbes last October.
On the corner of a congested Dallas intersection the umpteenth 7-Eleven is being built or, rather, assembled.
